heroSubtitle: On September 26, 2014, 43 students from the Ayotzinapa Rural Teachers' College were forcibly disappeared in Iguala, Guerrero. The 'historical truth' has been debunked, a Truth Commission declared it a crime of state, but full justice remains out of reach. Only 3 of 43 have been identified.
footerNote: Data compiled from GIEI reports (I–VI), Mexican Truth Commission, EAAF forensic reports, IACHR/OHCHR statements, and investigative journalism (Proceso, Animal Político, La Jornada). All contested claims are marked.
